hooks.command: /bin/sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/session_start.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/session_start.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/hooks/session_start.py" ]; then exec python3 "$HOME/.codex/hooks/session_start.py"; fi; exit 0'

/bin/sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/user_prompt_submit.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/user_prompt_submit.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/hooks/user_prompt_submit.py" ]; then exec python3 "$HOME/.codex/hooks/user_prompt_submit.py"; fi; exit 0'

/bin/sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/pre_tool_use.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/pre_tool_use.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/hooks/pre_tool_use.py" ]; then exec python3 "$HOME/.codex/hooks/pre_tool_use.py"; fi; exit 0'
